title: UK/Bulgaria: Agreement on Termination of Agreement for the Promotion and Reciprocal Protection of Investments, done at London on 11 December 1995 [CS Bulgaria No.1/2025]
body: "Published title: Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Bulgaria on the Termination of the Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Bulgaria for the Promotion and Reciprocal Protection of Investments, done at London on 11 December 1995. "
